name: page-chat-extension
description: Minimal Chrome MV3 side-panel chat about the current page, for any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

scripts.check:js: node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/sidepanel.js && node --check extension/lib/redaction.mjs && node --check extension/lib/browser-context-protocol.mjs && node --check extension/lib/sse.mjs && node --check extension/lib/markdown.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run check:js
